race.description: Moama Bowling Club Inglis Xtra Bonus Mdn Plate
race.comment: GATWICK (5) was well-fancied when resuming last start over 1213m at Sale when second, beaten 2.25 lengths. This looks a slight drop in grade, so well placed and expecting a strong run despite the wide draw. RUSSIAN SKY (7) returned in good style earlier this month, having jumped out well prior. Another who has a tricky gate to contend with but going well enough to feature with the right run. THINKYAHOT (4) wasn't far off maiden success before a break of four-and-a-half months, finishing the campaign with a minor placing over 1400m at Pakenham. Has trialled well leading into this and must be included in calculations. HIGHABOVEME (6) was beaten a long way first up, but that was by a smart one, and she'll be fitter here.
